2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Nohah Nichols #32 W

  • Height:
    6-3
  • Class:
    Freshman
  • Hometown:
    Zanesville, Ohio
  • Highschool:
    Tri-Valley
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career

Summary

Biography

BEFORE ASHLAND UNIVERSITY
  • As a senior, averaged 13.2 points, 8.1 rebounds and 3.2 assists per game, and shot 59.8 percent from the field.
  • Was named the District 12 Player of the Year, Special Mention Division III All-Ohio, first-team East District and first-team Muskingum Valley League.
PERSONAL
  • Son of Mike Nichols.
